name: Dynavap - The Hyper Cap
summary: The DynaVap Hyper Cap is a performance-focused titanium Cap engineered exclusively for use with the Hyper Tip.
description: The DynaVap Hyper Cap is a performance-focused titanium Cap engineered exclusively for use with the Hyper Tip. Designed to support a larger chamber and increased airflow, this advanced Cap & Tip pairing delivers a powerful, session-style DynaVap experience. Sold separately or as part of the Hyper system, the Hyper Cap is built for users who demand heavier draws and elevated vapour output. When paired with the Hyper Tip, it transforms traditional DynaVap use into a longer, more robust session, ideal for experienced users and connoisseurs. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
